_comment: Phase 30 parity baseline — canonical Yeo7 overlap on the ds004884-mini lesion. Generated by scripts/test_real_data_bridge.mjs and pinned here so a regression in resampleAffine / computePrealignAffine / computeParcelOverlap that shifts overlaps without crashing surfaces in CI. If the underlying resample math intentionally changes, regenerate by running the test and pasting the printed values back into this file (commit message must mention regenerating this fixture).

tolerance._networkAbsFloor: Per-network tolerance is max(networkAbsFloor, networkRelDiff * expected). Earlier flat ±25 was too loose for Visual=125 (20%) and too tight for Limbic=1904 (1.3%) — proportional gate fixes both.
